title: chiara-speech2text_schema-data
$comment: Confidence values use the scale 0-100 (percent). For programmatic comparisons prefer numeric values and consider indexing 'inference_confidence' for range queries.

entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this interaction record

audio_data.description: Path or URI pointer to the stored audio file

audio_source.description: Audio source; must be one of: whatsapp, frontend, dgx

audio_duration.description: Duration of the audio in seconds

inference_transcript.description: The text generated by the current Whisper model

inference_confidence.description: Token-level average log-probability used for confidence gating. Scale: 0–100 (percentage).

inference_model_version.description: Version/identifier of the Whisper model used for inference

inference_alternative_transcript.description: Alternative beam transcripts with confidence scores, to serve as DPO targets

confidence.description: Confidence score for this alternative beam

user_validated.description: True if the user (Chiara) accepted the transcript

reviewer_is_reviewed.description: True if a reviewer (Luca) manually verified or corrected this entry

reviewer_corrected_transcript.description: Ground-truth transcript provided by a reviewer (set when is_reviewed is true)

properties_reserved.user_id: Reserved for future use — unique identifier for user (UUID)
properties_reserved.device_id: Reserved for future use — unique identifier for user's device (UUID)
properties_reserved.keyboard_version: Reserved for future use — version of keyboard app
properties_reserved.server_version: Reserved for future use — version of server app
